name: Reckitt Benckiser Group plc
description: Reckitt Benckiser Group plc, commonly known as Reckitt, is a British multinational consumer goods company headquartered in Slough, United Kingdom. The company specializes in the manufacture and distribution of a wide range of health, hygiene, and nutrition products. With a global presence, Reckitt owns and manages a diverse portfolio of well-known brands that are sold in nearly every country worldwide. The company is committed to creating innovative solutions that promote healthier lives and happier homes, focusing on sustainable practices and consumer-centric product development to maintain its position as a leader in the global consumer goods market.
